title: GPT-5.4 mini rollout in ChatGPT — available to Free and Go users
summary: OpenAI rolls out GPT-5.4 mini to ChatGPT Free and Go users via the Thinking feature. Paid users retain access during high usage; enterprises can keep Auto routing.

title: Meta's $14.3 billion Scale AI data deal to power Avocado model
summary: Meta leverages $14.3B Scale AI data partnership as a 'data foundry' to accelerate Avocado model development, aiming to bypass performance plateaus that plagued other LLMs.

title: Google leases custom AI chips to Meta for LLM training
summary: Google signed a major agreement to lease access to its custom AI chips (TPUs) to Meta for training large AI models. Signals shift to intelligence as a utility in the data economy.

title: arnis: Generate real-world Minecraft locations with high detail via AI
summary: Generates any real-world location in Minecraft with high level of detail using AI. Rust, 1,073 stars today. Demonstrates AI-driven 3D world generation.

title: Newton: Open-source GPU-accelerated physics simulation engine (NVIDIA Warp)
summary: Open-source GPU-accelerated physics simulation engine built on NVIDIA Warp, targeting roboticists and simulation researchers. Python, 267 stars today.

title: Nvidia GTC 2026: NemoClaw, Robot Olaf, $1 trillion AI chip projection
summary: Jensen Huang's GTC keynote: $1 trillion AI chip sales projection through 2027, 'every company needs an OpenClaw strategy,' Robot Olaf mic cut, Travis Kalanick appearance.

title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day (NVIDIA)
summary: NVIDIA blog post on how to build domain-specific embedding models in under a day. Practical guide for fine-tuning embeddings for specialized use cases.

title: Cursor Composer 2 built on Kimi K2.5 via Fireworks AI
summary: Kimi.ai confirms Cursor's Composer 2 is built on Kimi K2.5, accessed via Fireworks AI hosted RL and inference platform as part of an authorized commercial partnership.

title: MiniMax M2.7: 'self-evolving' model performing 30-50% of RL research workflow
summary: MiniMax releases M2.7, a proprietary LLM designed for AI agents and third-party harnesses (Claude Code, Kilo Code, OpenClaw). Can perform 30-50% of reinforcement learning research workflow autonomously.

title: EverMind's MSA breaks 100M token limit for LLM long-term memory
summary: EverMind introduces MSA (Memory Sparse Attention) architecture achieving 100M token long-term memory. Performance degrades less than 9% scaling from 16K to 100M tokens. Potential 'Memory-as-a-Service' milestone.

title: NVIDIA DGX Spark: Scaling autonomous AI agents and workloads
summary: NVIDIA DGX Spark enables efficient autonomous AI agent workflows with Grace Blackwell Superchip. Supports up to 4 nodes, models up to 700B parameters, near-linear performance scaling.

title: Anthropic acquired Bun JS runtime as Claude Code reaches $1B milestone
summary: Anthropic acquired Bun JS runtime to support Claude Code. Claude Code reached $1B revenue milestone. Bun's Jarred Sumner significantly improved Claude Code performance.
